markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the Fieldguide \<\> GrowthX partnership to scale organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Support triple-digit YoY growth by scaling organic traffic, specifically targeting LLM search visibility to capture new audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Differentiator:** Fieldguide's unified AI platform is built for auditors by auditors, solving their workflows directly and enabling massive efficiency gains (e.g., 50% time cuts, 70% manual task elimination).](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Primary Competitor:** Inaction. Fieldguide loses deals when firms delay adopting new tech, not when they choose a direct competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Launch a new "Content Hub" for data-driven, SEO-focused articles, distinct from the existing blog reserved for CEO thought leadership and product updates.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3353.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Scaling Organic Growth for Aggressive Targets

  - [**Objective:** Meet aggressive ARR and pipeline targets for next year, which require triple-digit YoY growth.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [**Problem:** Current organic search is strong for branded terms but fails to capture new, unaware audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [**Solution:** Scale content production to increase LLM search visibility and attract new leads.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Jenny Cota discovered HockeyStack (a GrowthX client) via ChatGPT, validating the channel's potential.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Context:** This content initiative complements an existing SEM and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

### The Solution: Fieldguide's Core Differentiators

  - [**Practitioner-First AI:** Built for auditor workflows, not the other way around.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
      - [**Team:** Practitioners and AI experts collaborate on development.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [**Ethos:** "AI + people," not AI replacing people.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [**Unified End-to-End Platform:** The only one in the market, covering the entire audit lifecycle from data request to reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [**Massive Efficiency Gains:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [Cut audit times by 50% (e.g., 240 hrs → 120 hrs for one engagement).](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [Eliminate up to 70% of manual tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [Automate a 40-hour "rock report" in 40 seconds.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**Security & Governance:** Addresses auditor risk aversion with full transparency and certifications (ISO 42001, SOC 2).](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [**Strategic Positioning:** Occupies the middle ground between legacy tech (e.g., Thompson Reuters) and new entrants lacking industry depth.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

### The Audience: Who Fieldguide Serves

  - [**Current Customers:** \~100 logos, primarily from the top of the IPA 500 list (large firms).](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)
  - [**New Target Segments:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)
      - [**Mid-Market:** Growing traction for financial audit.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
      - [**Specialty Advisory Firms:** Focus on control audits (SOC, HITRUST).](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)
      - [**Canada:** International expansion is a key growth driver.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2257.0)
  - [**Buying Triggers:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
      - [Top-down directives from boards/CEOs to adopt AI.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
      - [Competitive pressure from peer firms using Fieldguide.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
      - [Inability to scale without hiring more staff.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)

### The Strategy: Content Hub & Performance Metrics

  - [**New Content Hub:** A separate section from the existing blog, which is reserved for CEO thought leadership and product updates.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3353.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Allows for high-volume, data-driven SEO content without being tied to a specific author.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3306.0)
  - [**Q4 OKR:** Jenny Cota shared an OKR to track progress, which will be refined with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3052.0)
  - [**Baseline Measurement:** GrowthX will establish a baseline for LLM-referred traffic using a new AI visibility tool and GSC/GA4 data.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)
  - [**High-Performing Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2610.0)
      - [**ABM Direct Mail:** Video cards with product demos drive nearly 50% of current pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2739.0)
      - [**Digital Assets:** "AI Maturity Framework," "Practitioner's Guide to AI," and the "Audit & Advisory Benchmark Report."](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Yasine Koehler:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3630.0)
      - [Grant GrowthX access to Gong recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=2471.0)
      - [Set up Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3251.0)
      - [Share links to high-performing content.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3630.0)
      - [Add GrowthX emails (Erik O'Brien, Ada) to Notion for access to internal marketing docs.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3750.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3530.0)
      - [Analyze all provided materials (Gong, Notion, GSC, GA4).](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3630.0)
      - [Develop foundational "artifacts" (personas, guidelines) in Notion for review.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
      - [Deliver a comprehensive content strategy in Week 2.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
      - [Publish the first calibration content piece in Week 3.](https://fathom.video/share/yNsrydAKRJJ8ddMLpgcjnLQGAzvFDmkr?tab=summary&timestamp=3570.0)
